Example SDL program, SDL application and graphics management, shim functions, and Waf build script.

## Folders
- **[examples](examples/README.md)**: Example SDL program and build script for drawing graphics with specified settings and dependencies.

## Files
- **[sdl_app.c](sdl_app.c.md)**: Initializes, runs, and deinitializes an SDL application with a basic event loop.
- **[sdl_app.h](sdl_app.h.md)**: Functions for initializing, deinitializing, and running the event loop of an SDL application.
- **[sdl_graphics.c](sdl_graphics.c.md)**: Initializes and manages SDL graphics context and rendering for an 8-bit framebuffer.
- **[sdl_graphics.h](sdl_graphics.h.md)**: Functions for initializing, rendering, and accessing the graphics context using SDL.
- **[shims.c](shims.c.md)**: Shim functions for memory management, logging, graphics context, and resource handling in SDL.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Configures and builds the SDL target for the Pebble firmware using the Waf build system.
